_source: content/manual/ship-units.json (gin7 manual 別表 艦艇ユニット) — REAL numbers only, each field {value, raw source substring, confidence, note}; null when OCR-corrupt/absent.
_wire_target: ResponseStaticInformationUnitShip 0x30b (28004 B = 4 + 200x140); fields per static dump 0x760984..0x760b2c (armor_front/side/back, shield, shield_capacity, beam_power, gun_power, missile_power, antiaircraft_power, speed, crew, term, repair, resource_loadage, fighter_num).

ships.name: 標準戦艦 (SS75型標準戦艦)

armor.note: 装甲 numbers corrupt/absent in OCR fragment

crew.note: 必要乗組員: no in-band value (OCR corrupt)

ships.desc: SS75型標準戦艦。強力な中性子ビーム砲とレーザー水爆ミサイル発射システムを主兵装とする宇宙艦隊の主力艦。艦隊戦・空戦・地上攻撃に対応可能な万能艦。やや旧式だが艦体の堅牢性に定評。バリエーション: 戦艦(旗艦), 戦艦Ⅰ〜Ⅷ。

ships.name: 高速戦艦 (PK86型標準高速戦艦)

armor.note: 装甲 numbers corrupt/absent in OCR fragment

gun_power.note: ガン破壊力: no in-band value (OCR corrupt)

crew.note: 必要乗組員: no in-band value (OCR corrupt)

ships.desc: PK86型標準高速戦艦。戦艦の打撃力と巡航艦に匹敵する高速航行能力を持つ主力艦。艦首主砲を中性子ビーム砲とし余剰容積を高出力機関へ。機動遊撃/前進部隊の中核。巨大機関部は重量軽減のため一部非装甲で防御に難点。バリエーション: 高速戦艦(旗艦), 高速戦艦Ⅰ〜Ⅷ。

ships.name: 巡航艦 (SK80型標準巡航艦)

shield_capacity.note: no シールド容量 (defenseless or OCR-lost)

ships.desc: SK80型標準巡航艦。中性子パルス砲および中性子ミサイル発射システムを主兵装とする中型艦。高速航行性能と戦艦に準ずる重武装・重装甲・戦闘艇搭載能力で幅広い作戦遂行能力。バリエーション: 巡航艦(旗艦), 巡航艦Ⅰ〜Ⅷ。

ships.name: 駆逐艦 (Z82型標準駆逐艦)

missile_power.note: no ミサイル破壊力 label

ships.desc: Z82型標準駆逐艦。劣化ウラニウム弾頭を短射程で発射するレールガンを主兵装とした高速艦。至近距離で極めて高い攻撃力、防御は軽微。小型ながら戦闘艇を搭載し複合的戦闘能力。バリエーション: 駆逐艦(旗艦), 高速艇(旗艦), 駆逐艦Ⅰ〜Ⅷ, 高速艇。

ships.desc: 銀河帝国で使用される典型的な商船。船倉モジュールを変更することで乗客・コンテナ・液体等を輸送可能な貨客船。重要人物搭乗船は宇宙海賊対抗のため武装するケースが多い。バリエーション: 民間船(旗艦), 商船。

ships.name: 標準戦艦 (787年型標準戦艦)

unit_count.raw: ユニット数 column present (values shown: e.g. 4, 1)

ships.desc: Main capital ship of the fleet (787-type standard battleship). Primary armament: powerful photon cannons, laser-hydrogen-bomb (レーザー水爆) missile launch system, and fighter craft. Built to counter the Imperial SS75-type standard battleship. Its semi-retractable fighter hangar is a defensive weak point, so it loses slightly in armor/defense, but is said to decisively surpass the SS75 in main-gun firepower, sailing/maneuver performance, and electronic-warfare capability. Variants: Ⅱ=787-G near-range rail-cannon upgrade w/ added armor; Ⅲ=787-M long-range laser-hydrogen-bomb system, hangar removed for ammo space; Ⅳ=787-L lightened armor, higher mobility ('快速戦艦'/fast battleship) for pursuit; Ⅴ=787-H heavily armored, hangar moved internal, slight mobility loss; Ⅵ=787-R recon battleship w/ Tengeri-class flagship-grade sensors & boosted thrusters (better turning); Ⅶ=787-E wartime rush-build, low-output engine (slower), cheap standard-cruiser sensors; Ⅷ=787-U automated 'unmanned ship' (無人艦), needs ~25% crew except special ops, no fighters, used for blockade/ramming-type special operations.

ships.name: 巡航艦 (795年型標準巡航艦)

unit_count.raw: ユニット数 column present (e.g. 5, 6, 9 in rows)

ships.desc: Medium ship (795-type standard cruiser). Primary armament: neutron missiles, photon pulse cannons, and fighter craft; designed for shorter-range engagement than the battleship. Smaller than the Imperial SK80-type standard cruiser but roughly matches it in combat power except for missile attack. The Alliance-characteristic semi-retractable fighter hangar remains a defensive problem. Variants: Ⅱ=795-B new bow neutron-pulse cannon, no fighters so fewer hull openings → better defense; Ⅲ=795-M longer-range/higher-power laser-hydrogen-bomb missiles, long-range missile support for battleships; Ⅳ=795-L stripped armor + high-output engine ('高速巡航艦'/fast cruiser); Ⅴ=795-H composite armor added, no fighters, slower & worse turning but trusted for toughness; Ⅵ=795-R fitted w/ 787-type battleship sensors ('偵察巡航艦'/recon cruiser, core of vanguard); Ⅶ=795-Ri improved R-type w/ Tengeri-class sensors, build cost rose to that of a 787 battleship so mass production cancelled; Ⅷ=795-C long-endurance refit ('フリゲート艦'/frigate) for convoy escort.

ships.name: 打撃巡航艦 (794年型打撃巡航艦)

gun_power.note: ガン破壊力: no in-band value (OCR corrupt)

fighter_num.note: 戦闘艇搭載数: no in-band value (OCR corrupt)

ships.desc: Strike cruiser (794-type). Created by removing the beam armament and fighter-carrying capability of the obsolete 790-type standard cruiser and fitting numerous neutron-missile launch systems. Has 3x the missile-throw capacity of the 795-type standard cruiser but reduced sustained-combat ability. Variants: Ⅱ=794-L lightened (non-essential composite armor removed) for better sailing; Ⅲ=794-H heavily armored but reduced missile capacity (armor eats internal space); Ⅳ=794-E wartime rush-build w/ merchant low-output engine and 796-type-destroyer-grade sensors.

ships.desc: Reda-class recon cruiser (production started 795). A fast ship dedicated to scout/liaison duty. Carries battleship-grade photon cannons and laser-hydrogen-bomb missiles, designed to also fight independently. Due to limited role, production count is very small. (Listed within the strike-cruiser appendix block; entry '偵察巡航艦隊' appears as a related grouping.)

ships.name: 駆逐艦 (796年型標準駆逐艦)

fighter_num.note: 戦闘艇搭載数: no in-band value (OCR corrupt)

unit_count.raw: ユニット数 column present (rows show 1, 6)

ships.desc: Destroyer (796-type). A heavily armed ship mounting 6 photon pulse cannons on a hull a bit over 1/2 the size of the 795-type cruiser. Shields, sensors, and crew living facilities are only the bare minimum for a spacecraft; carries no fighters in order to secure weapon volume. Variants: Ⅱ=796-M added neutron-missile system + extra attitude thrusters (slightly better turning); Ⅲ=796-L armor removed for high speed (almost no armor), escort for fast fleet flagships; Ⅳ=796-H added armor, slight mobility loss; Ⅴ=796-C long-endurance refit ('コルベット艦'/corvette) for convoy escort; Ⅵ=796-R forced-recon refit w/ 795-cruiser sensors + EM signal-blocking & stealth; Ⅶ=796-A AA-focused ('防空駆逐艦'/air-defense destroyer), AA power exceeds 795 cruiser; Ⅷ=796-E wartime rush-build, simplified sensors, neutron missiles as external launcher (only 4 shots), completes in ~half the build time.

ships.desc: Fighter-craft carrier (796-type). A large warship carrying 100 single-seat 'Spartanian' fighters in a semi-retractable hangar, with gunnery comparable to the 787-type battleship. Variants: Ⅱ=796-A simplified structure w/o bow photon cannon, but outwardly disguised to look identical to the standard carrier to avoid being singled out; Ⅲ=796-L reduced armor for high speed, lighter/weaker structure so turning is limited; Ⅳ=796-H composite armor added but the central semi-retractable fighter hangar untouched, still a defensive weak point.

ships.desc: Repair/engineering ship (793-type). Capable of repairing all types of ships belonging to the Free Planets Alliance fleet in space. Variants: Ⅱ=793-L lightweight hull, better mobility; Ⅲ=793-E small-ship low-output engine (greatly reduced sailing performance); Ⅳ=793-S increased repair-material loading capacity.

ships.desc: Transport ship (792-type). Super-large transport about twice the overall length of a fleet flagship, able to carry up to 500,000 tons (50万トン) of cargo. Equipped with photon pulse cannons for self-defense, giving limited combat power. Variants: Ⅱ=792-A photon pulse cannon omitted, some used for civilian purposes; Ⅲ=792-S improved A-type w/ thoroughly simplified sensors, always operated in convoy (not for solo voyage); Ⅳ=792-L boosted engine output for high speed, reduced cargo capacity (engine eats space).

ships.desc: Troop transport (788-type). In the Free Planets Alliance, government-subsidized fast merchant ships were requisitioned to transport troops. Can carry about 600 fully-armed troops and their equipment. Variants: Ⅱ=788-A added self-defense neutron-missile launch system; Ⅲ=788-L new engine for high speed, used to move troops within combat zones; Ⅳ=788-H reinforced armor, but the base is an unarmored civilian ship so defense is still not very strong.

ships.desc: Landing ship (listed as 795-type standard landing ship; variant descriptions reference 786-type). Outwardly identical, but the flagship version is a landing-command ship carrying a high-performance comms-equipment module. Variants: Ⅱ=786-L new engine for high speed, used for landing ops in combat zones; Ⅲ=786-H reinforced armor for combat-zone landing ops; Ⅳ=786-F specially modified for fortress-assault, boosted engine output for high speed and among the best-armored small ships, but designed only to carry armored grenadiers (装甲擲弾兵) — cannot load large vehicles like armored troopers.

ships.desc: Typical merchant ship used in the Free Planets Alliance. Ships carrying VIPs are often armed to fend off space pirates. The merchant ship is a passenger-cargo vessel that, by swapping cargo-hold modules, can transport passengers, containers, liquids, etc.

ships.name: 高速艇 (K86型高速艇)
ships.variant_modifier: K86型高速艇。Z82型標準駆逐艦に匹敵する船体に高出力推進機関を搭載、長距離連絡任務や要人移動に使用。自衛用に小型レールガンと隠顕式中性子ミサイル発射システムを装備。

missile_power.note: no ミサイル破壊力 label

missile_power.note: no ミサイル破壊力 label

missile_power.note: no ミサイル破壊力 label
